titleStmt.title: SII 9.200: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 200. (A.R. No. 450 of 1914.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF DABBAGUDI AT SOGI, HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 46, Plava, Pushya, śu 5 (mistake for śu. 15 ?), Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D. 1121 December 25 Sunday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Kalyāṇa and states that his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand and the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ghaṭṭiyarasa was ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred. The three brothers Nāgavarmayya-Nāyaka, Kāḷimayya-Nāyaka and Mahādēvayya-Nāyaka, sons of Basantimayya-Nāyaka, who was the son of Māraśiṅga-Nāyaka, son of Kalidaṇḍādhipa Nāgavarma, who were Brāhmans of Vatsa-gōtra, are said to have made a gift of land and a māna of oil, for the service of the god Kēśavadēva, set up by Nāgavarmayya, and for feeding Brāhmans. The bravery and munificence of the Nāyakas are highly extolled.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḻatiḻakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
mattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttaṁ kalyāṇapurada nelevīḍino
ḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttire . © tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpu
ravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśābaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḻakamaḷamārtaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rācigacōḷama
rōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhṛṁga nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
tribhuvanamallapāṁḍyadēvaru noṇaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdā
ḷuttamire svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ ghaṭṭiyarasaru kōgaḷiyaynū
ṟaṟa manneyamanēkādhiṣṭhitaṁ sukhadināḷuttamire . vṛtta . śaraṇene kāyaluṁ piḍidanīyalumāśrita
varggamellamaṁ poreyalu satyamaṁ nuḍiyaloppuva dharmmamaneyde pāḷisalu dhuradoḷidirci baṁda ri
puvaṁ gelalorvvane sālvanīgaḷī dhareyoḷageṁba kīrttivadhuvoṁdidaḷoppuva ghaṭṭibhūpanoḷu .
śrīmatu sōgeyūroḍeyaṁ nāgavarmayyanāyakaranvayakhyātiyenteṁdeḍe . vṛtte . kalidaṇḍādhipanā
gavarmanatuḻaśrīrūpusaujanyadoḷpalaruṁ mecce negartevettu piriyaṁ tānādanātaṁge nirmaḻatējaṁ śucisa
tyavākyanenisirdā mārasiṁgaṁ manōbaḷamaṁ māḍuva putranādanavanaṁ baṇnipparī dhātriyoḷu . Inu
pogarttavetta sujanaṁge mahōtsavanā basaṁtimayyaṁ taneyaṁ samastavibudhāśrayanātana dharmapa
tniyatyaṁtasuśīlarūpavati tānirugāṁbikeyādaḷeṁdoḍēnantavareydemāḍida purākritapu
ṇyamanēvogaḷvudō . vacana . Iṁtagaṇyapuṇyōdayanappa basaṁtimayyaṁgavirugāṁbikegavātmakulava
rddhanarenipa tanūbhavarāreṁdeḍe . gadya . svasti samastavastunidhānaru . viprakuḻapradhānaru . vibudhajanama
nassarōjinīrājahaṁsaru . sarasvatīkarṇnāvataṁsaruvārādhitaparamaśivapādāmbhōja(na)bhṛṁgaru dānagu
ṇasaṁgaru vasaṁtakuḻakumudinīvikāśacārucaṁdraprabharu vatsagōtraprabhavaruvā
śritajanakaḻpavṛkṣaru . gōtrapavitraru . parāṁganāputraru śrīsvayambhukalidēvasvāmipā
dābjabhṛṁgaru nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāprabhu sōgeyūroḍeyaṁ nāgavā
rmmayyanāyakarumavara tammaṁ kāḻimayyanāyakaru . vavariṁ kiṟiyaṁ mahādēvayyanāyakanuvi
ntīmūvaruvēkastharāgiṟdu śrīmaccāḻukyavikramavarṣada 46 neya plavasaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 5 mi
yādityavāradaṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti vyatīpāta nimitta śrīmadūroḍeya nāgavarmmayya
nāyakarmmāḍisida kēśavadēvargge biṭṭa dharmmavāvudeṁdaḍe hoḷaluguṁdeya dāriyiṁ māḍalutu
kṛṣṭavappa yereyakeyi matta 2 kaṭṭeya kōḍiyiṁ teṁka gaṅde kamma 200 Eleyaluvaḍakeya
lu kēṇiyaṁ koṁḍavaralli poṁgaḍḍa hoṟagaṇa bhattavaṁ tandaḻavalli mūlevatta hēṟiṁgobbaḷa
puḷagaṇa bhaṇḍige mūguḻa vūralutukṛṣṭavappudoṁdu gāṇada māneṇneyintinituma kēśa
vadēvaraṁgabhōgakka nivēdyakka naṁdādīvigega pūjisuva brāhmaṇana jīvitakkaṁ biṭṭarī dha
rmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ prayāgeyargghyatīrtthavenisida puṇya
sthānaṁgaḷoḷsāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷugumaṁ ponnoḷaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷaṁ kaṭṭisi vēdapāragarappa
sahasra bāhmaṇarggubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḻamakku . Ī dharmmamanaḷidātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētraṁ
prayāgeyargghyatīrtthavenisida puṇyasthānagaṁḷoḷsāyira kavileyuma vēdapāragarappa sahasra
brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda mahāpātakanakku . ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . Ī dharmmamaṁ mahāmaṇḍaḷē
śvaraṁ ghaṭṭiyarasaru sudharmmadiṁ pratipāḻisuvarupēkṣisidavarappaḍupēkṣādōṣaṁ ghaṭṭi
yarasargge . ślōka . bahubhirvvasudhā datā rājabhissagarādibhiryyasya yasya yadā bhū
mistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . vṛtta . bēgaṁ bēḍidoḍīvanaṁji maṟeyaṁ pokkiḻdaraṁ kāvanudyōgaṁ
māḍisidartthamaṁ paḍevanāraydanyakāntājanakkēgeyduṁ mana�moyanuttamikeyoḷu śau
ryatvadoḷu śaucadoḷnāgaṁ sarvajanānurāganenisalu ballaṁ peṟaṁ ballanē . jagadoḷagatya
pūrvva diṭave diṭavāvudu sāvitīrtha�vo yugadoḷmūrttigoṇḍu baravīvudu jaṁga
matīrtthavāgi kaimugiyaluvēḍa baṇnisaluvēḍa kelakkeḍeyāḍavēḍa nīṁ naguta śaraṇyaveṁde bage
dappudu bērppudu nāgavarmana . puruṣarēveṁdu pauruṣada baṭṭege sallada vēṣadhāri gaḷpuru
ṣarē nāgavarmma satpuruṣalalāma satyaravinandana sākṣarakarṇnapūra sajjanaguṇavastunā
yaka dharitriyoḷī vibhu dharmmatatpara . stutivṛtta . namōstvanaṁtāya sahasramūrta
yē sahasrapādākṣaśirōrubāhavē . sahasranāmnē puruṣāya śāśvatē saha
srakōṭiyugadhāriṇē namaḥ . kēśavāya namaḥ . gaṇapatayē namaḥ . sarasvatyai namaḥ
kāḷimayyanāyakaru tavage naḍeva hēṟiṁgoṁdu vīsada lekkava śrīsvayaṁbhukalidē
vasvāmidēvara nivēdyakke biṭṭaru . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ manneyaṁ ghaṭṭidēvarasaru
maduveyādalli haṁdarahaṇavaṁ śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmidēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭaru Ī dha
rmmava pratipāḷisadavaru vāraṇāsiprayāgeyalu kavilevaṁ brāhmaṇaruva konda pātakanakku .
Digital edition of SII 9.200 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
